2026-05-11 17:04:02,796 INFO [2025-12-11T00:00:00] Please note that a dedicated catalogue entry for this dataset, post-processed and stored in Analysis Ready Cloud Optimized (ARCO) format (Zarr), is available for optimised time-series retrievals (i.e. for retrieving data from selected variables for a single point over an extended period of time in an efficient way). You can discover it [here](https://cds.climate.copernicus.eu/datasets/reanalysis-era5-land-timeseries?tab=overview)
